raw.message:
BIG NEWS!
Get ready for the most epic gaming experience of your life!
What secrets will you uncover?
Play now and find out!

hook.summary: A POV-style UGC shot of a mobile game showing a 'boyfriend' carrying the player with a high-level unit.
hook.visual_action: Handheld camera recording a phone screen playing a tower defense game with text overlays identifying the players.
hook.text_overlay: POV : The Reason I'm Dating this Guy He's Got Max Level Surprise Mouse lol Boyfriend Me Getting carried without lifting a finger

scene_flow: Introduction of the 'Boyfriend' vs 'Me' dynamic with text overlays on a phone screen.
Demonstration of the 'Max Level Surprise Mouse' unit's high damage output.
Visual contrast showing the 'Me' side of the board remaining passive while enemies are cleared.
Close-up of the game board showing intense action and high damage numbers.
on_screen_text: POV : The Reason I'm Dating this Guy
He's Got Max Level Surprise Mouse lol
Getting carried without lifting a finger
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy tower defense and relate to social gaming tropes like being carried by a partner.
